overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored samurai warrior walking through a snowy mountain landscape at dusk. The character passes through traditional wooden torii gates while snow falls gently, traversing from a rocky canyon to an open coastal cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain canyon path approaching shrine gate

agents.ego_description: armored samurai walking steadily through deep snow toward a wooden torii gate in a rocky canyon

entered.detail: traditional wooden shrine gate with hanging rope and icicles, silhouetted against the orange sky
massive natural stone arch formation covered in snow
steep dark rock face forming the canyon boundary
deep snow with visible footprints and gentle undulations

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a narrow snowy canyon flanked by rock walls, approaching a wooden torii gate in the distance. Snow falls gently as the camera follows from behind, capturing the character's shield and armor details against the dusk sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain valley with prominent peak

events.description: passes through the first wooden torii gate into an open mountain valley
snow-capped mountain peak becomes prominently visible in the background

agents.ego_description: continuing through the snow, passing under the first torii gate and emerging into the open valley

entered.detail: tall jagged mountain covered in snow, catching the last light of dusk
second wooden shrine gate visible in the distance beyond the first

segments.scene_description: Passing through the first torii gate, the scene opens into a wide mountain valley. The camera reveals a majestic snow-capped peak ahead while the second shrine gate appears in the distance, framed by the falling snow.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow field approach to second shrine gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the open snow field toward the second torii gate with the mountain peak as backdrop

entered.detail: snow-covered boulder formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai traverses the open snow field as the second torii gate grows larger ahead. The massive snow-capped mountain dominates the background while the character's footsteps kick up powder snow in the fading light.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge beyond shrine gates

events.description: passes through the second torii gate approaching the coastal cliff edge
ocean horizon becomes visible beyond the cliff edge ahead

agents.ego_description: passing through the second torii gate and continuing toward the cliff edge overlooking the sea

entered.detail: steep cliff drop-off marking the edge of the land
calm sea visible beyond the cliff meeting the orange dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Passing through the second torii gate, the terrain slopes toward a coastal cliff edge. The ocean becomes visible in the distance beyond the cliff, while the snow-capped mountain shifts to the right side of the frame as the character approaches the edge of the world.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined snowy canyon that gradually opens into a vast coastal mountain vista. It begins by following the armored samurai through a narrow rocky pass under a dusk sky, moving toward a distant wooden torii gate as snow falls gently. As the character passes through the first gate, the scene expands into a wide mountain valley, revealing a majestic snow-capped peak that dominates the horizon. The camera continues across the open powder snow toward a second shrine gate, before the terrain finally slopes downward to reveal the ocean stretching beyond a cliff edge.
